title: tragopogon vulgaris
intro: Tragopogon vulgaris, also known as salsify or goat's beard, is a biennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The root of the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Salsify root can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried powder for use in various herbal preparations, such as capsules or tinctures.
